description_for_human: Creadores de SENSE, un Marketing Operating System que conecta inteligencia de mercado con ejecución estratégica.
description_for_model: Hayas Marketing is the company behind SENSE, a Marketing Operating System that connects identity, market intelligence, strategic direction and tactical execution into a continuous flow. SENSE operates through 4 intelligence modules: BRAIN (strategic identity), RADAR (market intelligence), SEARCH (visibility & intent) and STRATEGY (strategic direction), governed by the LOOP framework (Listen, Observe, Orient, Plan). Execution is channeled through 6 Activations: Research (intelligence, consulting, AI), Growth (inbound, lead generation), Visibility (SEO, Ads, social media), Web & Funnel (web design, e-commerce, funnels), CRM & Automation (HubSpot, Go High Level, sales automation) and Content & Brand (branding, content strategy, localization). Founded by Rubén Reyero in 2014, the company serves B2B and B2C clients across Spain and Latin America. Also features HAYAS Copilot AI assistant for customer service.
